heading: Annual reports
label: 4018 Annual reports
text: Every person to whom a certificate of review is issued shall submit to the Secretary an annual report, in such form and at such time as the Secretary may require, that updates where necessary the information required by .section 4012(a) of this title
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Oct. 8, 1982section 312 of Pub. L. 97–290section 4011 of this title
